fps_t(3) Library Functions Manual fps_t(3)

NAME

fps_t - FPS tracking state.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/util/fps.h>

Data Fields


uint64_t frame_count
uint64_t last_fps_report_ns
uint64_t last_frame_time_ns
int expected_fps
uint64_t report_interval_ns
const char * tracker_name

Detailed Description

FPS tracking state.

Maintains timing information for FPS calculation and lag detection. All timing fields use nanosecond precision (uint64_t). Should be zero-initialized on creation.

Definition at line 52 of file fps.h.
